question: Based on the cost trend chart, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: The cost increased by the same amount every year.
options.B: The highest cost years cannot be fully compared because the area for the last year is clipped by the top of the chart.
options.C: The cost in 2021 and 2022 is the same.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
